section.heading: Sense of Congress
section.chapeau: It is the sense of Congress that—

paragraph.content: the missions of the Bureau of Border Security and the Bureau of Citizenship and Immigration Services are equally important and, accordingly, they each should be adequately funded; and
the functions transferred under this part should not, after such transfers take effect, operate at levels below those in effect prior to November 25, 2002.

note.heading: Change of Name
note.p: Bureau of Border Security, referred to in par. (1), changed to Bureau of Immigration and Customs Enforcement by Reorganization Plan Modification for the Department of Homeland Security, eff. Mar. 1, 2003, H. Doc. No. 108–32, 108th Congress, 1st Session, set out as a note under section 542 of this title.
